requests.text: Hi, can you tag my account as interested in the annual plan? Thinking about upgrading.
Your last invoice double-charged me $40. Please refund the duplicate.
What's the difference between the Pro and Team plans? Quick question.
I'm getting a 500 error every time I export. This is blocking my whole team.
Actually please delete my account and all my data. I'm switching tools.
Can you note on my account that we need SSO before renewal?
I was promised a 20% loyalty discount last month but it never applied. Can you refund the difference of $18?
Thanks for the help yesterday — just wanted to say the new dashboard is great!
